creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Zane,
Thanks for the patch - it looks good. Can you please confirm if you have done any build testing? If so, attaching the build logs (from poudriere if you have it) would be great.

I assume this update would break the build of synfig and synfigstudio? I normally update etl, synfig and synfigstudio all at the same time. So whilst this patch looks good, I don't believe it should be committed until we also have a patch for synfig and synfigstudio.
Thanks,
Ben
